title: Ranchitas Caldosas with Ranchitas Nacho Excitante
ingredients: 1 pack Ranchitas Nacho Excitante (or the flavor of your choice).
instructions: Step: Cut the fillet into cubes.
Step: Place the fish in a bowl, add lime juice and orange juice, and season with pepper.
Step: Let rest for at least 8 hours in the refrigerator.
Step: Add ½ cup onion and ½ cup red bell pepper inside the Ranchitas package.
Step: Add the fish cubes and finely chopped cilantro to the package.
Step: Serve with lime to taste.
